# Virtual Try-On

- Route: `/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/model/functionalityTry`
- Source API mapping path: `/src/docs/apiReference/model/functionalityTry/api.ts`
- Source chunk: `https://s16-kling.klingai.com/kos/s101/nlav112918/api-doc/assets/api-DBZg_XyU.js`

## Endpoint IDs

- `create-virtual-try-on`
- `query-virtual-try-on-single`
- `query-virtual-try-on-list`

## Endpoint Paths

- `/v1/images/kolors-virtual-try-on`
- `/v1/images/kolors-virtual-try-on/{id}`

## Raw API Chunk Source

```javascript
const e={title:{en:"Virtual Try-On",zh:"虚拟试穿"},endpoints:[{id:"create-virtual-try-on",method:"POST",path:"/v1/images/kolors-virtual-try-on",title:{en:"Create Task",zh:"创建任务"},description:{en:"Virtual try-on allows you to generate images of a person wearing specific clothing.",zh:"虚拟试穿功能允许你生成穿着特定服装的人物图像。"},headers:[{name:"Content-Type",type:"string",required:!0,default:"application/json",description:{en:"Data Exchange Format",zh:"数据交换格式"}},{name:"Authorization",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Authentication information, refer to API authentication",zh:"鉴权信息，参考接口鉴权"}}],requestBody:[{name:"model_name",type:"string",required:!1,default:"kolors-virtual-try-on-v1",description:{en:"Model Name",zh:"模型名称"},enum:["kolors-virtual-try-on-v1","kolors-virtual-try-on-v1-5"]},{name:"human_image",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Reference human Image",zh:"上传的人物图片"},notes:[{en:"- Supports inputting image Base64 encoding or image URL (ensure accessibility)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"- Important: When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Submit only the raw Base64 string.",zh:"- 注意：请确保您传递的所有图像数据参数均采用Base64编码格式。若您使用 Base64 方式，请不要在 Base64 编码字符串前添加任何前缀（如 `data:image/png;base64,`），直接传递 Base64 编码后的字符串即可。"},{en:"- Correct Base64 format:\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 正确的 Base64 编码参数：\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Incorrect Base64 format (with data: prefix):\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"- 错误的 Base64 编码参数（包含 data: 前缀）：\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- The image file size cannot exceed 10MB, and the width and height dimensions of the image shall not be less than 300px",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px"}]},{name:"cloth_image",type:"string",required:!0,description:{en:"Reference clothing image",zh:"虚拟试穿的服饰图片"},notes:[{en:"- Support uploading clothing product images or clothing image with white background; Supports single clothing (upper, lower, and dress) try-on",zh:"- 支持上传服饰商品图或服饰白底图，支持上装 upper、下装 lower、与连体装 dress"},{en:"- Supports inputting image Base64 encoding or image URL (ensure accessibility)",zh:"- 支持传入图片 Base64 编码或图片 URL（确保可访问）"},{en:"Base64 Encoding Note:\n Please note, if you use the Base64 method, make sure all image data parameters you pass are in Base64 encoding format. When using Base64, do NOT add any prefix like `data:image/png;base64,`. Only provide the Base64-encoded string.\n\nCorrect:\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```\n\nIncorrect:\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```",zh:"Base64 编码说明：\n请注意，若您使用base64的方式，请确保您传递的所有图像数据参数均采用Base64编码格式。使用 Base64 时，请不要添加任何前缀如 `data:image/png;base64,`，只需提供 Base64 编码字符串本身。\n\n正确示例：\n```plaintext\niVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```\n\n错误示例：\n```plaintext\ndata:image/png;base64,iVBORw0KGgoAAAANSUhEUgAAAAUA...\n```"},{en:"- Supported image formats: .jpg / .jpeg / .png",zh:"- 图片格式支持 .jpg / .jpeg / .png"},{en:"- File size: ≤10MB, dimensions: min 300px",zh:"- 图片文件大小不能超过 10MB，图片宽高尺寸不小于 300px"},{en:'- The kolors-virtual-try-on-v1-5 model not only supports single clothing input, but also supports "upper + lower" combination input:\n  - Input a single clothing image (upper, lower, or dress) → Generate a try-on image of the single item\n  - Input a combination clothing image (merge multiple items into one image with white background):\n    - "upper + lower" → Success\n    - "upper + upper" → Fails\n    - "lower + lower" → Fails\n    - "dress + dress" → Fails\n    - "upper + dress" → Fails\n    - "lower + dress" → Fails\n\n![](https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/try-on.jpeg)',zh:'- 其中 kolors-virtual-try-on-v1-5 模型不仅支持单个服装输入，还支持"上装+下装"形式服装组合输入，即：\n  - 输入单个服饰图片（上装 or 下装 or 连体装）→ 生成试穿的单品图片\n  - 输入组合服饰图片（您可以将多个单品服饰白底图拼接到同一张图片）：\n    - "上装+下装" → 成功\n    - "上装+上装" → 失败\n    - "下装+下装" → 失败\n    - "连体装+连体装" → 失败\n    - "上装+连体装" → 失败\n    - "下装+连体装" → 失败\n\n![](https://p2-kling.klingai.com/kcdn/cdn-kcdn112452/kling-api-document/try-on.jpeg)'}]},{name:"callback_url",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"The callback notification address for the result of this task. If configured, the server will actively notify when the task status changes.",zh:"本次任务结果回调通知地址，如果配置，服务端会在任务状态发生变更时主动通知。"},notes:[{en:"- For specific message schema, see [Callback Protocol](/global/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)",zh:"- 具体通知的消息 schema 见 [Callback 协议](/cn/dev/document-api/apiReference/callbackProtocol)"}]},{name:"external_task_id",type:"string",required:!1,description:{en:"Customized Task ID",zh:"自定义任务 ID"},notes:[{en:"- Will not overwrite system-generated task ID, but supports querying task by this ID",zh:"- 传入不会覆盖系统生成的任务 ID，但支持通过该 ID 进行任务查询"},{en:"- Please note that the customized task ID must be unique within a single user
```
